name: Loan For Any Purpose
description_short: Detroit storefront lender offering cash advances, payday loans, title loans, and personal loans from $250 to $50,000. All credit types welcome with same-day funding options.
description_long:
Loan For Any Purpose is a consumer lending company operating a physical storefront at 3403 Grand River Ave #200 in Detroit, Michigan, with a corporate address also listed in Atlanta, Georgia. The company positions itself as an accessible alternative to traditional bank lending, emphasizing its openness to all credit types and its ability to fund loans quickly. The Detroit location serves a neighborhood market with walk-in access and a dedicated local phone line at (313) 228-3440.

The company offers a broad suite of loan products spanning a wide range of borrowing needs. Cash advances and payday loans serve borrowers needing less than $1,000 for immediate expenses. Same-day loans are available for those requiring fast approval with minimal documentation. Installment loans cover the $1,000 to $5,000 range, while bad credit loans span $250 to $50,000 for borrowers with damaged credit histories. Title loans—secured by the borrower's vehicle title—allow borrowing up to $50,000. Unsecured personal loans of up to $50,000 are also offered, though these carry a recommendation for a higher credit score, setting them apart from the other products which welcome all credit types.

The Detroit location operates with notably extended hours—Monday through Friday from 7am to 8pm, and Saturday through Sunday from 9am to 6pm—giving working borrowers flexibility beyond standard banking hours. Loan For Any Purpose states that submitting an application will not impact the applicant's FICO score; instead, the company may use a non-traditional consumer reporting agency for credit review. Online applications are accepted through the company's website, though digital applicants should be aware that identity verification requirements may extend the disbursement timeline by up to two business days.

Despite a wide product lineup, the website discloses no APR ranges, interest rates, origination fees, or repayment term details for any loan product—a meaningful transparency gap for consumers trying to compare costs before applying. The company's own legal disclosures state that its products are designed for short-term financial needs and are explicitly 'not intended as a long-term borrowing solution.' Borrowers with persistent credit difficulties are directed to certified credit counseling services. The complete absence of rate information online means cost comparisons require completing an application first, limiting informed decision-making upfront.
pros: All credit types accepted on six of seven loan products, including bad credit and no-credit borrowers
Wide loan range from $250 to $50,000 covers both small emergency needs and larger financing
Title loans available up to $50,000 secured by vehicle title
Same-day loans offered with fast approval and minimal documentation requirements
Applying does not affect FICO score — uses non-traditional consumer reporting agency
Online applications available in addition to in-store access
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee information disclosed anywhere on the website
Online applications may add up to two business days to funding due to verification requirements
Personal loans (up to $50,000) require a higher credit score, excluding the most credit-challenged borrowers from the largest loan amounts
Company's own disclosures state products are not suitable for long-term or ongoing credit needs
Rate and product availability vary by state and applicant with no specifics provided
best_for: Detroit-area borrowers with bad or thin credit needing quick access to small-dollar loans
Vehicle owners seeking title-backed loans up to $50,000 without a prime credit score
Workers needing same-day or next-day emergency cash outside typical banking hours
Borrowers who want a soft-pull pre-screening that does not affect their FICO score
diagnosis: Loan For Any Purpose is best suited for Detroit borrowers with imperfect credit who need fast access to cash and cannot qualify at a bank or credit union, particularly those who can leverage a vehicle title for a larger loan. The primary caveat is the complete lack of disclosed rates or fees on the website, meaning borrowers cannot assess the true cost of borrowing until after they apply.
services: Cash advances (under $1,000, unsecured, all credit types)
Payday loans (up to $1,000, all credit types)
Same-day loans (fast approval, minimal documents, unsecured)
Title loans (up to $50,000, secured by vehicle title, all credit types)
Installment loans ($1,000–$5,000, unsecured, all credit types)
Personal loans (up to $50,000, unsecured, higher credit score recommended)
In-store loan processing at 3403 Grand River Ave, Detroit
Online loan applications with remote verification
